meaning: adj.无马的,不用马的,自行推进的
examples: He dreamed of a horseless carriage.
It cost the outrageous sum of 50 cents (about $12.75 in today's money) to attend what was known as the "horseless horse show."
Ford's year of curiosity and tinkering. He dreamed of a horseless carriage. When he built one, the world of transportation was changed forever.
Think back to how horseless carriages, modern architecture, and print journalism yielded to cars, post-modern structures, and social media.
She is Khaleesi now of a horseless army of unmanned men whose brutal training has left them only part human.
